content:
We're Hiring: Full Stack Engineer (100% Remote)

Company: IP META

Location: Remote (Worldwide)

Employment Type: Full-time

Salary: USD $1,200–$1,900/month

At IP META, we're building high-performance IP intelligence infrastructure that powers developers and businesses worldwide. Our platform delivers real-time IP geolocation, ASN lookup, proxy detection, VPN detection, and cyber threat intelligence through fast, scalable APIs.

Tech Stack

Node.js

Firebase

Cloud Firestore

REST APIs

JavaScript

HTML5

CSS3

Tailwind CSS

What You'll Do

Build and scale backend services

Develop secure REST APIs

Design and optimize Firebase databases

Build responsive web interfaces

Improve performance and reliability

Work with a distributed engineering team

What We Offer

✅ 100% Remote – Work from anywhere

✅ Company laptop provided

✅ Internet allowance

✅ Medical insurance

✅ Fast-moving engineering team with real product ownership

Requirements

Strong Node.js experience

Experience with Firebase and Firestore

REST API development

Modern JavaScript, HTML & CSS

Git and collaborative development workflows

If you're passionate about building scalable products and solving real-world engineering challenges, we'd like to hear from you.

Apply here: https://ip-meta.xyz/careers
